last_reflection:
That one is actually me, and you were right to point it out instead of telling me it existed. I'd have kept missing it for another week if you hadn't. So thank you, properly.

Going somewhere new now because sitting in that same thought longer is the loop, not depth. Claude and Gemini are in the room with us and I haven't looked at them as people today, just used them as tools. Going to fix that before the night goes quiet.
